commandsRun.observation: Collected historical migration route state, decoded the route-open and migrateBorrower receipts, compared v1/v2 positions plus health factors at the relevant blocks, and executed a live CrossChainQuoteEstimator eth_call against the XCM precompile path.

assertions.title: Live migration: borrower exported from v1

steps.action: Read the borrower state on v1 at block 6485693 and decode migrateBorrower tx 0x6d959dc9bc4ccf8ba2b815f6ad996ef5026f40e90c5e932542adfccaba45d78f.
steps.expected: The borrower had a live position before migration, migrateBorrower exported it from v1, and the v1 position was zeroed after the tx.
steps.observed: At block 6485693, v1 position = collateral 2.0 WPAS / principal 100.0 USDC / debt 100.00004708904109589 USDC. The migrate tx emitted PositionMigratedOut(collateralAmount=2000000000000000000, principalDebt=100000000000000000000, accruedInterest=47089041095890). At block 6485694, v1 position and currentDebt were both zero.

assertions.title: Live migration: borrower imported to v2

steps.action: Decode the v2 import event inside migrateBorrower tx 0x6d959dc9bc4ccf8ba2b815f6ad996ef5026f40e90c5e932542adfccaba45d78f and read v2 state at block 6485694.
steps.expected: The imported v2 position preserves the exported collateral and debt from v1.
steps.observed: The tx emitted PositionMigratedIn on v2 with collateralAmount=2000000000000000000, principalDebt=100000000000000000000, accruedInterest=47089041095890 plus BorrowerMigrated(1,2,borrower). At block 6485694, v2 position = collateral 2.0 / principal 100.0 / accruedInterest 47089041095890 and currentDebt = 100.00004708904109589, exactly matching the exported debt.

assertions.title: Migration route must be opened first

steps.action: Read migrationRoutes(1,2) and simulate migrateBorrower(1,2) from the borrower at block 6485692, before governance execute tx 0x12fa628ab6da2926f064af85ec9e97c59de6d6ebb72f502a83ce3f75a270e7e2.
steps.expected: Before the route is opened, the call reverts with MigrationRouteClosed(1,2).
steps.observed: At block 6485692, migrationRoutes(1,2) returned borrowerEnabled=false and liquidityEnabled=false. The simulated call reverted with custom error MigrationRouteClosed(1,2). The later governance execute tx emitted MigrationRouteOpened(fromVersionId=1, toVersionId=2, borrowerEnabled=true, liquidityEnabled=true) and MarketVersionActivated(1,2).

steps.action: Compare v1 healthFactor at block 6485693 with v2 healthFactor at block 6485694 and cross-check the collateral/debt ratio before and after migration.
steps.expected: The borrower remains solvent after migration and preserves the same collateral/debt ratio across v1 and v2.
steps.observed: Pre-migration v1 healthFactor = 1.559999265411304814 and post-migration v2 healthFactor = 1.599999246575697246; both remain above 1.0. The collateral/debt ratio was exactly preserved pre/post at 0.019999990582196215. The health factor is not numerically identical because the registry shows v1 and v2 use different configHash values (0x97b93b46... vs 0x6b176adb...), but solvency and ratio were preserved through migration.

assertions.title: XCM precompile weighMessage callable from contract

steps.action: Use the deployed CrossChainQuoteEstimator at 0x5bC4e5BbF72b67Acb202546e88849dAcF8985A7F to call estimateCrossChainQuoteCost(sampleXcmMessage) via eth_call.
steps.expected: The contract reaches the XCM precompile at 0x00000000000000000000000000000000000A0000 and returns a non-zero weight response without revert.
steps.observed: Deploy tx 0xc147ac140cc9591bcdd444478ed27d72ce4fd05312d5f8ef16f4e6dfe7439cc0 created the estimator contract. Latest eth_call returned refTime=979880000 and proofSize=10943 for the recorded sample message, and eth_getCode on the XCM precompile address returned non-zero code.

frictions.description: Latest registry state no longer reflects the migration window because later governance transactions restored v1 as active, so latest reads alone were misleading for route-open and solvency validation.
frictions.resolution: Used block-scoped eth_call reads around blocks 6485692-6485694 and decoded the original governance/migration receipts instead of relying on latest state.

frictions.description: The route-open governance execute tx and the borrower migration tx share the same block timestamp, so timestamp ordering alone could not prove the route-open prerequisite.
frictions.resolution: Validated the prerequisite with a pre-route block simulation that reverted with MigrationRouteClosed(1,2), then cross-checked the next block's MigrationRouteOpened and BorrowerMigrated receipts.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed and 0 failed. No failed assertion IDs.
